mission: Run one AIT-Omega 16-circ-n cycle that generates, attacks, scores, selects and decompresses candidate AIT modules into traceable GitHub artifacts.
forbidden_actions: Use paid external APIs without explicit permission.
Create accounts or cloud resources outside GitHub.
Make physical-world claims canon without tests.

positive: Use GitHub Actions as free bounded cloud runner.
Keep all outputs traceable as JSON and Markdown.
negative: Do not confuse swarm voting with truth.
Do not promote untested physical claims.

next_action: Generate top16 AIT modules and decompress the best into a one-page codex plus test plan.
